<!-- One of the most useful contributions! The more detail, the faster an adapter can be built. -->

## Forum

- **Name:**
- **A public thread URL (sample):**
- **Forum software, if known:** <!-- e.g. Discourse, phpBB, XenForo, vBulletin, custom -->

## What's broken or missing today

<!-- What doesn't extract correctly with the generic parser, or that there's no adapter yet. -->

## Page details (optional, helps a lot)

- **Are posts threaded/nested?** yes / no / not sure
- **Are there role labels (mod/admin/staff)?** yes / no / not sure
- **Is the thread paginated?** yes / no / not sure

## Can you provide an HTML fixture?

<!-- A saved copy of a representative thread page is the single most helpful thing
     you can attach. See CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/ADAPTERS.md. -->

- [ ] I can attach a saved HTML fixture
- [ ] I'd like help creating one
